summary: Comprehensive testing completed for MathQuest Phase 1 prototype - all core features working correctly. Backend APIs (13/13 passed), frontend UI fully functional with adventure map visualization, and all 3 demo students displaying proper mastery profiles and error patterns.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing aria-describedby for DialogContent components

passed_tests: All 13 backend API endpoints working correctly (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with exactly 3 demo student cards (Alex Champion, Jordan Struggling, Sam Careful)
Student card navigation to adventure maps working correctly
Adventure map displays 43 islands with proper status colors (mastered=green, approaching=orange, locked=grey)
Island detail modals opening and displaying correct information
Teacher Dashboard loads with 4 KPI cards and complete student table
Error pattern badges displaying correctly (PREREQ_GAP for Jordan Struggling)
Anxiety flags working correctly (Sam Careful shows 36 anxiety flags)
Teacher Student Detail view with Grade 4/5 tabs working properly
All navigation between pages functioning correctly
Demo student profiles match specifications: Alex (high mastery), Jordan (PREREQ_GAP), Sam (anxiety)
